title: Youtube poop: The Revenge of Scorpion!
description:
well that was quicker than I thought . . . this one is a poop of Mortal Kombat Defenders Of The Realm its a little show based of the mortal kombat movies not the games this is probably the first MK youtube poop here. 
plot: nightwolf was just haveing fun with his new keyboard at home base till the gang find out scorpion is trying to build an army of skeletons and mummy-looking zombies so it up to the gang to stop scorpions evil plans!
I feel kinda bad for takeing these from ExtremeCool he is the one who posted episodes of mortal kombat I will give him credit for that. HAPPY 4th OF JULY
